brief: Create Google Search Ads (RSAs) for RMS Equipment Services in the Rio Grande Valley targeting heavy equipment owners/operators (mostly middle-aged men). Goal: drive calls/leads for service/repair/maintenance. Provide 3 ad variants with different offer angles (diagnostic, preventive maintenance, fast turnaround). Include: 12-15 headlines (<=30 chars), 4 descriptions (<=90 chars), suggested sitelinks + callouts. Mention RGV/Rio Grande Valley. Avoid unverifiable claims.
